title: Clone Marines (disambiguation)
content:
'''Clone Marines''' may refer to one of the following:
*The [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]], a group of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] under [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] and [[Bacara/Legends|Bacara]].
*[[Clone marine]]s, a type of clone trooper used in the boarding of enemy ships.

{{Disambig}}
